summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jared Talbot landing page. All core features working correctly including navigation, hero section, route cards, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Email placeholder 'you@example.com' detected as exposed email (false positive)

passed_tests: Page loads with dark theme and orange accents
Navigation links work (Routes, Approach, Contact, Get in Touch)
Hero section displays with correct headline 'Simple systems. Real solutions.'
Choose Your Route button scrolls to routes section
Request Help button scrolls to contact section
Jared Fixes card displayed as primary with orange accent border
Visit Jared Fixes button links to https://jaredfixes.com
GrowYourBTC card displays correctly
Visit GrowYourBTC button links to https://growyourbtc.com
Simple Systems card shows 'Coming Soon'
Trust/Approach section displays three principle cards
Contact form displays with Name, Email, Message fields
Contact form has hidden honeypot field
Contact form submission works with success message
No actual email addresses exposed in page content
Footer displays copyright and tagline
Mobile responsive layout works correctly
Mobile navigation menu functions properly
All buttons are clickable and functional
External links open in new tabs with proper security attributes
